title: edge-platform-v1
description: Edge platform service contract v1 — 31 operations across DNS management, Workers KV storage, D1 databases, and Cloudflare Tunnels.

operations.name: dns_list_zones
operations.description: List DNS zones with filtering by name, status, and account

operations.name: dns_get_zone
operations.description: Get details for a single zone by ID or domain name

operations.name: dns_list_records
operations.description: List DNS records with type, name, content, and proxied filters

operations.name: dns_get_record
operations.description: Retrieve a single DNS record by ID

operations.name: dns_export_records
operations.description: Export all DNS records in BIND zonefile format

operations.name: dns_create_record
operations.description: Create a new DNS record (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, SRV, CAA, NS, etc.)

operations.name: dns_update_record
operations.description: Partial update (PATCH) of an existing DNS record

operations.name: dns_delete_record
operations.description: Permanently delete a DNS record (destructive, requires confirmation)

operations.name: dns_bulk_create
operations.description: Create up to 100 DNS records in a single operation

operations.name: dns_bulk_update
operations.description: Update up to 100 DNS records in a single operation

operations.name: kv_list_namespaces
operations.description: List Workers KV namespaces in the account

operations.name: kv_list_keys
operations.description: List keys in a KV namespace with optional prefix filter

operations.name: kv_get
operations.description: Retrieve the value of a single key from a KV namespace

operations.name: kv_put
operations.description: Write a key-value pair to KV with optional TTL and metadata

operations.name: kv_delete
operations.description: Permanently delete a key from KV (destructive, requires confirmation)

operations.name: kv_bulk_put
operations.description: Write up to 10,000 key-value pairs in a single operation

operations.name: kv_bulk_delete
operations.description: Permanently delete up to 10,000 keys in a single operation (destructive, requires confirmation)

operations.name: d1_list_databases
operations.description: List D1 databases in the account with size and table counts

operations.name: d1_get_database
operations.description: Get details for a single D1 database

operations.name: d1_query
operations.description: Execute read-only SQL queries (SELECT) with bind parameters

operations.name: d1_execute
operations.description: Execute write SQL statements (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DDL) with confirmation gate

operations.name: d1_export
operations.description: Export all table schemas and row counts from a database

operations.name: d1_list_tables
operations.description: List all tables in a database with row counts

operations.name: d1_describe_table
operations.description: Describe a table schema using PRAGMA table_info

operations.name: tunnel_list
operations.description: List Cloudflare Tunnels with optional name filter

operations.name: tunnel_get
operations.description: Get details for a single tunnel by ID

operations.name: tunnel_create
operations.description: Create a new Cloudflare Tunnel

operations.name: tunnel_delete
operations.description: Permanently delete a tunnel (destructive, requires confirmation)

operations.name: tunnel_list_configs
operations.description: Get ingress configuration (routing rules) for a tunnel

operations.name: tunnel_update_config
operations.description: Replace tunnel ingress configuration (destructive, requires confirmation)

operations.name: tunnel_list_connections
operations.description: List active connections (connectors) for a tunnel
